overview: Pirate Swordman is a Normal-class Humanoid/Human monster found in Ship Graveyard. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 90 HP, 22 physical damage, 150 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 1. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Melee Attack4 at 190% ratio (418 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Melee Attack4.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Melee Attack1 (130%), Melee Attack2 (180%), Melee Attack3 (150%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Earth
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-1500), Earth (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Melee Attack4
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Melee Attack4. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 50 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Melee Attack4

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
